step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Enter the following menu items: DIAGNOSIS / OBD/MOBD / DTC INFO / CURRENT CODES.
Read the DTC by following the prompts on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.

step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Enter the following menu items: DIAGNOSIS / OBD/MOBD / DTC INFO / CLEAR CODES.
Erase the DTC by following the directions on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.
